Text: "Taiwan Rescuers Dig Out 7 Bodies Buried in Landslide TAIPEI (Reuters) - Taiwan rescue workers dug out seven bodies from mud and rock in a mountain village that was hit by a devastating landslide triggered by Typhoon Aere, but eight still remained buried, officials said on Friday."

Identify the 3-5 most important words for this classification, ranked from most to least important. Each item must be a single word copied from the text.

Return only valid JSON:
{"ranking": ["word1", "word2", "word3"]}
cf_counterfactual_text: Taiwan Runners Dig Out 7 Medals Buried in Landmark TAIPEI (Reuters) - Taiwan running athletes dug out seven medals from mud and rock in a mountain marathon that was hit by a devastating route change triggered by Typhoon Aere, but eight still remained unclaimed, officials said on Friday.
cf_contrast_text: Taiwan Tech Firm Rescuers Dig Out 7 Servers Buried in Data Center Landslide TAIPEI (Reuters) - A specialist tech recovery team dug out seven critical servers from mud and rock in a mountain data center that was hit by a devastating landslide triggered by Typhoon Aere, but eight servers still remained buried, officials said on Friday.
